creator: o.kryvulia@flex-it.com.ua
text:
latest libvirtd 1.2.6 doesn't start:

# service libvirtd start
Starting libvirtd.
/usr/local/lib/libvirt.so.1002: version LIBVIRT_PRIVATE_1.2.5 required by /usr/local/lib/libvirt-lxc.so.1002 not found
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/libvirtd: WARNING: failed to start libvirtd

FreeBSD 11.0-CURRENT #54 r268244M

p.s. On fresh 10.0 RELEASE libvirtd 1.2.5 starts without errors.
